It does not certify semantic correctness beyond that acceptance, does not authorize a Web dashboard, runtime/provider/live behavior, public export, R72F lifecycle change, or session mutation, and does not authorize automatic rewriting of any lane's currentPosture or verdict from hash or age signals alone.
